etapas.tutorial: Bring the magnetic key fob close to the sensors on the housing (B1, B2, B3) to operate without opening the cover.
Hold the key fob on button B1 for 6 seconds to access the Off-line Settings.
Tap button B3 with the key fob to navigate the menu to the output options.
Tap button B2 to confirm and save the setting. The setting has been applied.

tutorialInicial: Place the object on the surface to begin the problem solution.
popupInicialTexto1: Point your camera at a flat surface and wait for the white background to appear.
popupInicialTexto2: Once it appears, tap the screen to view the object.
